summary: Cost feedback UI testing complete. All 5 features verified working correctly. Backend caching returns from_cache:true on second identical call. Frontend shows 'from cache — $0.00' toast for single cached analysis. ScriptOverview shows cost summary bar with scene count, cache percentage, and estimated cost.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/analyze/text returns from_cache:true on second identical call - PASS
Backend: POST /api/analyze/text returns _debug.cached:true on cache hit - PASS
Frontend: Single scene analysis shows 'Breakdown ready (from cache — $0.00)' toast when cached - PASS
Frontend: ScriptOverview header shows cost summary bar (data-testid='cost-summary-bar') - PASS
Frontend: Cost summary bar shows scene count (e.g., '2 scenes') - PASS
Frontend: Cost summary bar shows cache percentage (e.g., '100% from cache') when cached > 0 - PASS
Frontend: Cost summary bar shows estimated cost (e.g., 'Est. $0.00' or 'Est. $0.06') - PASS
Frontend: Full Script batch analysis toast shows 'X scenes analyzed · Y from cache · Est. $Z' format - PASS
Frontend: Cost summary bar only appears when costSummary data exists in scriptData - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: App.js handleAnalyze (lines 75-76): Correctly checks result.from_cache || result._debug?.cached for cache toast
App.js handleFullScriptAnalyze (lines 232-247): Correctly computes costSummary {total, cached, fresh, estimatedCost} and shows toast
ScriptOverview.jsx (line 37): Correctly destructures costSummary from scriptData
ScriptOverview.jsx (lines 101-116): Cost summary bar with Zap icon, scene count, cache percentage, and estimated cost renders correctly
Cost summary bar conditional rendering (line 101): Only shows when costSummary && costSummary.total > 0
seed_data_creation: Test scenes cached during testing for cache verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cost feedback UI fully tested. Key features: 1) Single analysis shows 'from cache — $0.00' toast when result.from_cache or result._debug.cached is true, 2) Full Script batch analysis shows 'X scenes · Y from cache · Est. $Z' toast after completion, 3) ScriptOverview header shows cost summary bar (data-testid='cost-summary-bar') with Zap icon, scene count, cache percentage (green text), and estimated cost. The cost summary bar only renders when scriptData.costSummary exists and costSummary.total > 0. Cache percentage is computed as Math.round((cached/total)*100). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_cost_optimization.py covers cache behavior.

single_analysis_cache_toast.details: Shows 'Breakdown ready (from cache — $0.00)' when result.from_cache or result._debug.cached is true

batch_analysis_cost_toast.details: Shows 'X scenes analyzed · Y from cache · Est. $Z' format after batch completion

cost_summary_bar.details: data-testid='cost-summary-bar' shows scene count, cache percentage (green), and estimated cost

cost_summary_bar_conditional.details: Only renders when costSummary exists and costSummary.total > 0

backend_from_cache_field.details: POST /api/analyze/text returns from_cache:true and _debug.cached:true on cache hit
